verses.text: <ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>长<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>老<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>写<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiě</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>亲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qīn</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>该<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Gāi</rt></ruby><ruby>犹<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yóu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>诚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>亲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Qīn</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">di</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>兴<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>盛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>身<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēn</rt></ruby><ruby>体<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>健<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>壮<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhuànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>正<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>灵<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">línɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>魂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hún</rt></ruby><ruby>兴<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>盛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yànɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>明<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>存<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cún</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>正<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>按<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>而<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>甚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shèn</rt></ruby><ruby>喜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>乐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lè</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>按<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>而<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>喜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>乐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lè</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡe</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>亲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Qīn</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">di</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>向<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>客<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kè</rt></ruby><ruby>旅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>忠<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>会<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>明<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby>。<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>配<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pèi</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>帮<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>助<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhù</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>往<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>好<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby>；

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby>(<ruby>原<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>文<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wén</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby>“<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby>”)<ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>外<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wài</rt></ruby>，<ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>于<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yú</rt></ruby><ruby>外<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wài</rt></ruby><ruby>邦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>无<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wú</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>取<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǔ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>应<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>该<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡāi</rt></ruby><ruby>接<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>待<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>责<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">zé</rt></ruby><ruby>备<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>丢<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">Diū</rt></ruby><ruby>特<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">tè</rt></ruby><ruby>腓<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">féi</rt></ruby>

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>曾<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>略<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lüè</rt></ruby><ruby>略<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lüè</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>写<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiě</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>会<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huì</rt></ruby>；<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>会<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>好<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>首<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>丢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Diū</rt></ruby><ruby>特<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tè</rt></ruby><ruby>腓<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">féi</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>接<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>待<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>。

所Suǒ以yǐ我wǒ若ruò去qù，必bì要yào提tí说shuō他tā所suǒ行xínɡ的de事shì，就jiù是shì他tā用yònɡ恶è言yán妄wànɡ论lùn我wǒ们men，还hái不bù以yǐ此cǐ为wéi足zú。他Tā自zì己jǐ不bù接jiē待dài弟dì兄xiōnɡ，有yǒu人rén愿yuàn意yi接jiē待dài，他tā也yě禁jìn止zhǐ，并bìnɡ且qiě将jiānɡ接jiē待dài弟dì兄xiōnɡ的de人rén赶ɡǎn出chū教jiào会huì。

<ruby>亲<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Qīn</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">di</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>效<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiào</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">è</rt></ruby>，<ruby>只<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>效<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiào</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>善<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shàn</rt></ruby>。<ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>善<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>属<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>乎<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hū</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">è</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>未<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>曾<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby>。<ruby>最<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">de</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>安<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">ān</rt></ruby>

<ruby>低<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dī</rt></ruby><ruby>米<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>丢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">diū</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>善<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shàn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhènɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhènɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhènɡ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>原<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>许<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>写<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiě</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">què</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yi</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>笔<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>墨<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mò</rt></ruby><ruby>写<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiě</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>盼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">pàn</rt></ruby><ruby>望<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>快<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kuài</rt></ruby><ruby>快<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kuài</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>谈<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tán</rt></ruby><ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lùn</rt></ruby>。
